CustomField.description: Date and time when a subject matter expert validated this AI-assisted decision element. Required when nepa_ai_assisted_draft__c = true and Selected__c = true. Provides the administrative record audit trail showing human review occurred before the AI-generated content was adopted into the NEPA decision. Citation: OMB M-25-21 Section 4(b).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Date/time SME validated this AI-assisted content. Required for selected AI-drafted elements.
CustomField.label: SME Validation Date
